mapper.select: SELECT r.exam_paper_name, r.exam_paper_myscore, a.id, a.exam_details_uuid_number, a.exam_record_id, a.users_id, a.exam_question_id, a.exam_details_myanswer, a.exam_details_myscore , a.create_time, a.update_time, a.exam_paper_topic_sequence, eq.exam_question_name, eq.kemu_types AS kemuTypes, eq.exam_question_options, eq.exam_question_answer, eq.exam_question_analysis, eq.exam_question_types, eq.exam_question_sequence, u.nickname AS nickname, u.user_name AS userName, u.avatar AS avatar, u.phone AS phone, u.email AS email, er.total_score, a.exam_paper_topic_number, a.teacher_score, a.teacher_comment, a.review_status FROM exam_record d LEFT JOIN exam_paper r ON d.exam_paper_id = r.id LEFT JOIN exam_details a ON d.id = a.exam_record_id LEFT JOIN exam_question eq ON a.exam_question_id = eq.id LEFT JOIN users u ON a.users_id = u.id LEFT JOIN exam_record er ON a.exam_record_id = er.id where d.exam_record_uuid_number = #{uuid} ORDER BY a.exam_paper_topic_sequence ASC, a.id ASC
mapper.sql: IFNULL(er.is_latest, 1) = 1 AND ( er.status = 3 OR ( er.status IN (1, 2) AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM exam_paper_topic ept INNER JOIN exam_question eq ON ept.exam_question_id = eq.id WHERE ept.exam_paper_id = er.exam_paper_id AND eq.exam_question_types = 5 ) ) )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record er WHERE er.id = #{recordId} AND er.exam_info_id IS NOT NULL AND
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM exam_record er WHERE er.exam_info_id = #{examInfoId} AND AND IFNULL(er.total_score, 0) > IFNULL(#{totalScore}, 0)

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT er.users_id) AS participants, AVG(er.total_score) AS avgScore, MAX(er.total_score) AS maxScore, SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= IFNULL(ei.passing_score, 60) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS passCount, COUNT(*) AS gradedCount, COUNT(DISTINCT ei.id) AS examCount FROM exam_record er INNER JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id

SELECT IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= 90 AND er.total_score <= 100 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cnt90, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= 80 AND er.total_score < 90 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cnt80, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= 70 AND er.total_score < 80 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cnt70, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= 60 AND er.total_score < 70 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cnt60, IFNULL(SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score < 60 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS cnt0 FROM exam_record er INNER JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id

SELECT ei.exam_name AS examName, AVG(er.total_score) AS avgScore FROM exam_record er INNER JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id
GROUP BY ei.id, ei.exam_name, ei.start_time ORDER BY ei.start_time DESC LIMIT 12

SELECT ei.id AS examInfoId, ei.exam_name AS examName, CASE WHEN ei.start_time IS NULL THEN '' WHEN ei.end_time IS NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(ei.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ELSE CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(ei.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '—', DATE_FORMAT(ei.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) END AS examTimeDisplay, COUNT(DISTINCT er.users_id) AS participants, AVG(er.total_score) AS avgScore, MAX(er.total_score) AS maxScore, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= IFNULL(ei.passing_score, 60) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS passRate FROM exam_record er INNER JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id
GROUP BY ei.id, ei.exam_name, ei.start_time, ei.end_time, ei.passing_score ORDER BY ei.start_time DESC

SELECT ei.id AS examInfoId, ei.exam_name AS examName, CASE WHEN ei.start_time IS NULL THEN '' WHEN ei.end_time IS NULL THEN DATE_FORMAT(ei.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ELSE CONCAT( DATE_FORMAT(ei.start_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s'), '—', DATE_FORMAT(ei.end_time, '%Y-%m-%d %H:%i:%s') ) END AS examTimeDisplay, COUNT(DISTINCT er.users_id) AS participants, AVG(er.total_score) AS avgScore, MAX(er.total_score) AS maxScore, (SUM(CASE WHEN er.total_score >= IFNULL(ei.passing_score, 60) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*)) AS passRate FROM exam_record er INNER JOIN exam_info ei ON er.exam_info_id = ei.id
GROUP BY ei.id, ei.exam_name, ei.start_time, ei.end_time, ei.passing_score ORDER BY ei.start_time DESC
